name: Tangy Spare Ribs
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut ribs into serving sized pieces and place on a rack in a shallow roasting pan.
2. Bake, uncovered, at 350°F for 1 hour.
3. In a medium saucepan, sauté onion and celery in butter for 4-5 minutes or until tender.
4. Add remaining ingredients; mix well. Bring to a boil, then reduce heat.
5. Cook and stir until slightly thickened, about 10 minutes. Remove from the heat.
6. Drain fat from the roasting pan.
7. Pour sauce over ribs. Bake for an additional 1 1/2 hours or until meat is tender.
